head: current_direct_bbox
hypothesis: E-32: CIoU + center=0.0 + T=5 + 8ep cheap probe. CIoU = DIoU + aspect ratio consistency penalty (α*v term). Camouflaged animals often have non-square bounding boxes (elongated shapes, partial occlusion). CIoU's aspect ratio penalty may help the model predict more accurate box shapes. Hypothesis: if CIoU's α*v term provides useful shape signal beyond DIoU's center penalty, mIoU > E-28 (0.2893). If mIoU ≈ E-28, aspect ratio penalty adds no value for this data. If successful (mIoU > 0.295), test CIoU + T=7 and/or 30ep. Cost: ~40min, 8ep probe.
